title: ruellia ciliosa var. hybrida
intro: Ruellia ciliosa var. hybrida, also known as the coral ruellia or firecracker ruellia, is a hybrid plant species within the Acanthaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ruellia ciliosa var. hybrida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it easily accessible for use in folk medicine.
